FULL POVER

WHEREAS it is necessary that a fit and proper person should be appointed as Representative having

Full Power and Authority to sign on behalf of the

Democratic socialist Republic of sri lanka, the

Co-operation Agreement between the Government of the

Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka and the

Government of the French Republic on the Peaceful

Uses of Nuclear Inergy,

I, ABDUI, CADER SHAHUL HAMEED, Minister of

F'oreign Affairs, do hereby certify that Honourable

Mr. C. Cyril Mathew, Minister of Industries and scientific Affairs, has been and by these presents is confirmed and duly named, constituted and appointed as Representative having Full Fower and Authority to sign the said Agreement on behalf of the Democratic

Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka,

IN VIINESS WHEREOF, I have signed these presents and affixed hereto my seal at Colombo this Monday the

Eleventh day of the month of Bak of the year Iwo

Thousand Five Hundred and Iventy Three of the Buddhist

Era (this Fonday the Seventh day of April, One Thousand

Nine Hundred and Eighty of the Christian Era).

Sgå. A.C.S. HAMEED

Minister of Foreign Affairs
